content: {{warningMessageMyDocuments}} All shared files as well as rooms created by this contact will be reassigned automatically to an admin performing the deletion: <1>{{userPerformedDeletion}} ({{userYou}})</1>. Reassign data manually to choose another destination user for reassignment.

comment.text: This is a warning message displayed in a dialog when deleting a user. It informs the user that all shared files and rooms created by the deleted contact will be reassigned to the admin performing the deletion. The `{{warningMessageMyDocuments}}` variable contains a preceding warning, and `{{userPerformedDeletion}}` is the name of the admin.
